subject_tmpl: Thank you for fixing the pothole on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I just wanted to drop a quick note to say thank you. The pothole at {STREET} and {CROSS} has been repaired and it looks great. I submitted that request about {DAYS} days ago and honestly expected to wait much longer. My neighbors and I really appreciate how quickly your Public Works crew got it done. Bellwood is lucky to have a team that actually follows through. Thanks again — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the kind words, {FIRST}! Hearing that our crews are making a difference in your neighborhood means a great deal. I'll pass your thanks along to Frank and the Public Works team. Please don't hesitate to reach out if anything else comes up on {STREET}.

subject_tmpl: Kudos to your crew — {STREET} water main
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here, {ADDRESS}. I wanted to personally thank your crew for the water main repair on {STREET} last {DATE}. They showed up on time, kept the noise to a minimum, and had water restored to our block in under {DAYS} hours. I was bracing for a long day without water. Please let the guys know a resident noticed and is grateful.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thanks so much — I'll absolutely share your message with the crew at our next morning meeting. Fast, clean work on water mains is what we strive for. Glad it went smoothly!

subject_tmpl: Great job at Taste of Bellwood this year
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — my family attended Taste of Bellwood on {DATE} and had an absolutely wonderful time. The music lineup was perfect, the food vendors were top-notch, and the park was clean and well-organized. My kids are already asking when the next one is. You and your staff should be proud. Events like this make Bellwood feel like a real community. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Helpful service at Village Hall — thank you
body_tmpl: Good morning. I visited Village Hall on {DATE} to ask about a FOIA request for records on {STREET}. The clerk who helped me — I believe it was Yolanda — was patient, thorough, and explained the process without making me feel like a bother. In an era where good customer service is rare, it stood out. Please pass along my appreciation to her and the whole office.
reply_tmpl: Thank you so much for reaching out — I'll make sure this gets back to the right person. Residents like you make this work worthwhile. Don't hesitate to call if you need anything else with your request.

subject_tmpl: Snow removal on {STREET} — a big thank you
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I'm writing after the snowstorm on {DATE} to say how impressed I was with how fast the plows came through {STREET}. By 6 a.m. the road was passable and by noon it was completely clear. I know plow drivers work brutal hours during storms. Please make sure they know their efforts are noticed and appreciated by residents like me. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Your message made my morning, {FIRST}. Our plow drivers start at 2 a.m. during major storms and push through until the streets are safe. I'll share your thanks with the crew — it means more than you know.

subject_tmpl: Water billing question resolved quickly — thanks
body_tmpl: Hi, this is {FIRST} {LAST}, account {ACCT}. I called about a charge I didn't recognize on my bill last week and the representative who helped me sorted it out in about ten minutes. She walked me through the meter reading, explained the rate change, and even caught a small credit that was owed to me. I was expecting a runaround. Instead I got fast, friendly help. Thank you!
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — so glad we could clear that up quickly! If you ever have questions about your account {ACCT} in the future, don't hesitate to call or email us.

subject_tmpl: Thank you for the park improvements near {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor — the new benches and plantings near {STREET} and {CROSS} look fantastic. I walk through there every morning with my dog and the difference is night and day. I heard the Parks department did the work in-house — impressive. Small improvements like this make a big difference for everyday quality of life. Keep up the great work. — {FIRST}

subject_tmpl: Alley repaving on the {STREET} block — residents are happy
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} at {ADDRESS}. Just want to say our block is thrilled with the alley repaving that wrapped up on {DATE}. No more busted tires or muddy ruts every spring. The crew left the area cleaner than they found it, which I really appreciated. Several neighbors asked me to pass along their thanks as well. A job well done.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the note, {FIRST}! Hearing that from neighbors is the best reward. We'll note the positive feedback in our project log for that alley segment.

subject_tmpl: Grateful for fast response to drainage issue on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, after last week's heavy rain I reported flooding in front of {ADDRESS} and was honestly shocked to get a call back the same afternoon. An inspector came out the next morning and the drain was cleared by noon. I've lived on {STREET} for {AGE} years and that kind of turnaround is new. Thank you for building a team that responds. {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Thank you, {NAME}. Quick drainage response is especially critical during storm season and I'm glad the team delivered. I'll make sure Tom Reyes and his crew hear your feedback.

subject_tmpl: Permit process for {ADDRESS} — smoother than expected
body_tmpl: Hello, I recently went through the permit process for a garage addition at {ADDRESS} and expected it to be a nightmare based on experiences in other towns. Instead it was straightforward. The online checklist was clear, my inspector showed up on the scheduled day, and {FIRST} in your office answered every question I had by email within a day. Really appreciate the professionalism.

subject_tmpl: Holiday lighting on {STREET} looks wonderful
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I drive down {STREET} every evening and the holiday lights your team installed are absolutely beautiful this year. It lifts the spirits of everyone in the neighborhood. My kids point them out every night on the way home. Little touches like this remind us why we love Bellwood. Thank you and happy holidays from the {LAST} family.
reply_tmpl: Happy holidays to the {LAST} family! We put a little extra effort into the lights on {STREET} this season and I'm so glad it's bringing some joy. Wishing you and yours a wonderful holiday.

subject_tmpl: Rodent complaint at {ADDRESS} — resolved, thank you
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here. I filed a rodent complaint (case {CASE}) for the vacant lot near {STREET} and {CROSS} on {DATE}. Your office followed up within {DAYS} days, baiting was done, and the problem has noticeably improved. I know this stuff isn't glamorous but it matters a lot to the block. Appreciate the professional handling.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — glad we could help. We'll schedule a follow-up inspection at {STREET} in about 30 days to confirm the baiting held. Call us if you see activity before then.

subject_tmpl: Plow driver on {STREET} deserves recognition
body_tmpl: Hi Mayor, I want to call out the plow driver who cleared {STREET} during the {DATE} storm. At about 3 in the morning I watched from my window as he made multiple passes to make sure a tricky corner near {CROSS} was fully clear. That level of care in the middle of the night is above and beyond. Can you find out who it was? I'd love to thank them by name. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: What a lovely note, {FIRST}. I checked with Public Works and the driver on {STREET} that night was one of Frank's long-time crew members. I've already forwarded your email to him personally. Thank you for taking the time.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood volunteer coordination — well done
body_tmpl: Hi Kevin, I volunteered at Taste of Bellwood this year and wanted to say it was the best-organized event I've been part of. Check-in was smooth, assignments were clear, and you kept us updated throughout the day. Even when the rain threatened Saturday afternoon you stayed calm and it kept the whole crew calm. Really excellent event management. I'll be back next year for sure. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Thank you — bulk trash pickup on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — just a short note to say how much the residents on {STREET} appreciate the bulk trash pickup program. Items that would have sat for weeks were gone in a single pass. My neighbor {FIRST} and I were talking about it and agreed the program is one of Bellwood's best. Saves everyone money on junk haulers too. Keep it going! — {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Code enforcement follow-up on {STREET} — thank you
body_tmpl: Hello. I reported an overgrown lot at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} (case {CASE}). The officer who came out was professional and explained the notice process without making it confrontational. The property owner has since cleaned up. I appreciate that your department handled it firmly but fairly. That approach keeps neighbors from feuding. Thanks, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the update on case {CASE}, {FIRST}. Voluntary compliance is always the best outcome and we're glad it worked out. We'll close the case and do a follow-up check in 30 days.

subject_tmpl: Crosswalk painting near {STREET} — great safety improvement
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor, the new crosswalk markings at {STREET} and {CROSS} are a fantastic safety upgrade. As a parent who walks kids to school through that intersection every morning, I cannot tell you what a difference visible crosswalks make. Drivers are actually stopping now. This was clearly a thoughtful decision. Thank you for prioritizing pedestrian safety. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for sharing that, {FIRST}. Pedestrian safety near school routes is a top priority and it's great to hear the new markings are making drivers pay attention. Appreciate you taking the time to write.

subject_tmpl: Thank you for Village support during our renovation
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — on behalf of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}, I want to express sincere gratitude for the Village's support during our renovation project this spring. The building department was responsive, the inspector was flexible with scheduling, and the process felt like a partnership rather than an obstacle. We're now fully open and the new space looks great. Bellwood is a good place to do business. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Congratulations on the reopening of {BIZ}! It was our pleasure to work with you. Please stop by Village Hall sometime — we'd love to see photos of the new space.

subject_tmpl: Pothole repair in front of {BIZ} — thank you
body_tmpl: Hi Frank, {FIRST} {LAST} here from {BIZ} on {STREET}. We've been asking about that pothole out front for a while and your crew came through on {DATE} and did a really clean job. Customers had been complaining about it and now the parking lot entry is smooth. My delivery trucks will thank you too. Really appreciate the responsiveness.

subject_tmpl: Business license renewal — fast and easy this year
body_tmpl: Good afternoon. I'm {FIRST} {LAST}, owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. Renewing our business license used to take multiple trips to Village Hall. This year I did it online in about ten minutes. The confirmation came the same day. Whoever implemented that upgrade deserves a raise. Please pass our thanks to whomever made that happen. We'll see you next year — digitally.
reply_tmpl: So glad the online renewal worked well for {BIZ}! We rolled out that system last quarter and feedback like yours tells us it was worth the effort. Thank you!

subject_tmpl: Water restored quickly after main break — thank you
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the water main break on {STREET} near {CROSS} on {DATE} could have been a real mess. Instead service was restored in {DAYS} hours. Your crew was on-site within minutes, they kept residents informed, and they cleaned up the site afterward. I've seen other towns leave a dig site a disaster for weeks. Not here. Very impressed. {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Storm drain project update — thank you for keeping us informed
body_tmpl: Hi Tom, I'm {FIRST} {LAST} at {ADDRESS}. I attended the public meeting on the {STREET} drainage project on {DATE} and wanted to say thank you for how thoroughly you explained the engineering. Most of us aren't engineers but you made it completely understandable. The project timeline and budget breakdown were clear. More departments should present like that. We're supportive of the work going forward.
reply_tmpl: Thank you, {FIRST} — that's really encouraging to hear. If you have any questions once work begins on {STREET} please reach out directly. Residents who are engaged make projects go more smoothly.

subject_tmpl: Spring clean-up day — neighborhood looks amazing
body_tmpl: Hi Mayor — I just wanted to say the spring clean-up event on {DATE} was a smashing success on our block of {STREET}. The dumpsters arrived on time, the crew was helpful loading heavier items, and by the end of the day the street looked like a different place. Neighbors who haven't talked in years came out and chatted while cleaning up. Great community-building event. Thank you! — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: This makes me so happy to read, {FIRST}. The clean-up day is one of my favorite events precisely because it brings neighbors together. Hope to see you again at the next one!

subject_tmpl: Property tax question answered quickly — appreciate it
body_tmpl: Hello, this is {FIRST} {LAST}. I emailed your office on {DATE} with a question about my property tax installment and got a clear answer the very same day. The person who replied — I believe her name was in the signature — even anticipated my follow-up question and answered it in advance. That kind of service is rare. Thank you very much.

subject_tmpl: New sidewalk on {STREET} — a long time coming, thank you
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — I've lived at {ADDRESS} for {AGE} years and watched the sidewalk on {STREET} crumble block by block. The new section installed this month is beautiful. Safe for strollers, walkers, and kids on bikes. I know capital projects take time and budget to line up and I appreciate the patience and persistence it took to get this done. Sincerely, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Your note means a great deal, {FIRST}. That sidewalk segment took three budget cycles to fund but it was always on the list. Thank you for your patience and for writing.

subject_tmpl: Food inspection at block party — thank you for making it easy
body_tmpl: Hi, I organized the block party on {STREET} on {DATE} and the health inspector who came to check our food setup was fantastic. She was thorough but didn't make us feel like criminals. She gave us a few tips to make sure everything was safe and even complimented our setup. Made the whole event feel more official in a good way. Please pass along our thanks. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Thank you — leaf collection was early and thorough this year
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor, I know leaf collection seems mundane but on {STREET} we have a lot of mature trees and fall can get overwhelming fast. This year the collection trucks came earlier than in past years and made three passes. My gutters are clear, the street is clean, and my neighbors are happy. Small thing, big impact. Thank you. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for noticing, {FIRST}. We shifted the schedule this year based on tree canopy data by block and it sounds like it worked on {STREET}. We'll keep the early-pass approach next fall.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood vendor experience — outstanding
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — {BIZ} participated as a food vendor at Taste of Bellwood for the first time this year. From application to setup to breakdown, every step was clearly organized. Kevin and his team were always available and the crowds were fantastic. We sold out by {TIME} on Saturday. We'll definitely apply again next year and will tell other businesses to do the same. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: So wonderful to hear from you! Having quality vendors like {BIZ} is what makes Taste of Bellwood special. We'll make sure Kevin keeps you on the early-notification list for next year's applications.

subject_tmpl: Street light repaired on {STREET} — feels safe again at night
body_tmpl: Hi Frank, I'm {FIRST} at {ADDRESS}. The street light that's been out for weeks on {STREET} near {CROSS} finally got fixed on {DATE}. Walking home from the Metra after dark felt unsafe before. Now it's fine. Such a straightforward thing but it really matters for people who walk at night. Thanks to you and your crew.

subject_tmpl: Police presence at {STREET} block party — community appreciated it
body_tmpl: Mayor, our block on {STREET} held its annual party on {DATE} and Officer Banks stopped by in a really positive way — not enforcement, just community connection. He talked to the kids, answered questions from adults, and stuck around for a bit. Everyone felt better about it. That kind of community policing is exactly what we need more of. Thank you for a department that does it right. — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for sharing that, {NAME}. Community policing events are something we actively encourage and I'm glad Officer Banks made such a positive impression. I'll pass your words along to him.

subject_tmpl: Final inspection on {ADDRESS} — fast and professional
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here, permit for {ADDRESS}. The final inspection was scheduled for {DATE} at {TIME} and the inspector arrived within 15 minutes of that time, which I know is not guaranteed. He was thorough, pointed out one small item, gave us a week to correct it, and we passed on re-inspection. Really appreciated the professionalism and the clear communication throughout.
reply_tmpl: Glad to hear the process went smoothly, {FIRST}. Congratulations on passing final inspection at {ADDRESS}! Enjoy the project.

subject_tmpl: Emergency water shut-off handled perfectly — thank you
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I had a pipe emergency at {ADDRESS} late on {DATE} and called the Village emergency line. Within {DAYS} hours a crew was there to shut off the main. They were calm, efficient, and checked back with me the next morning to make sure everything was okay. I was panicking and they made me feel like it was going to be fine. Truly grateful for that team. {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for reaching out, {FIRST}. Emergency calls at odd hours are part of what we do, but it's always meaningful to hear that the crew made a stressful situation more manageable. Hope all is well at {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Summer concert series — please bring it back next year
body_tmpl: Hi Kevin — {FIRST} {LAST} here. I attended {NUM} of the summer concerts this year and loved every one. Good variety of acts, good sound setup, and the park was always clean afterward. It draws a really nice mix of Bellwood residents — families, seniors, young adults. The community feeling at those events is something you can't manufacture. Please fight for the budget to keep them going. Thank you!
reply_tmpl: Thank you, {FIRST} — feedback like yours is exactly what I bring to budget conversations. So glad you made it to {NUM} concerts. We're already planning next summer's lineup!

subject_tmpl: Sanitation crew on {STREET} — above and beyond
body_tmpl: Mayor, I want to recognize the sanitation crew that services {STREET} on {DATE}. My recycling bin was accidentally knocked over by wind the night before and was upside down in the street. Instead of skipping it, the driver got out, righted the bin, collected it, and placed it back neatly on the curb. That is going out of his way in a real way. I wish I had gotten his name. Please thank whoever it was.
reply_tmpl: What a great story — thank you for taking the time to share it. I've asked Frank to check which crew covers {STREET} on that day and pass along your recognition. It makes a difference.

subject_tmpl: High-bill dispute resolved fairly — account {ACCT}
body_tmpl: Good morning. I disputed a spike on my water bill (account {ACCT}) from {DATE} and your team investigated and found a running toilet had caused the usage jump. You processed a one-time leak adjustment of {AMOUNT} and explained the whole process clearly. I'll be honest — I expected a fight. Instead it felt fair and transparent. Thank you for treating customers like people.

subject_tmpl: Bellwood cooperation on county road project — excellent partnership
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — on behalf of Cook County, I want to recognize the outstanding cooperation we received from Bellwood's engineering and public works teams on the {STREET} resurfacing project. Tom Reyes was responsive, well-prepared, and helped us navigate a tricky utility conflict efficiently. We look forward to the next project together. — {FIRST} {LAST}, Cook County {DEPT}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the kind words about Tom and our team. Bellwood values our partnership with the County and we look forward to continued collaboration. Please don't hesitate to reach out directly.

subject_tmpl: Thank you for the senior services program
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, my mother is {AGE} years old and lives alone on {STREET}. The senior wellness check program your office runs has been a lifeline for our family. Knowing that someone from the Village checks in on her weekly gives us enormous peace of mind. She looks forward to the calls. Please keep this program funded. It is doing more good than you know. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for this message, {FIRST}. Please tell your mother she has friends at Bellwood Village Hall. The senior wellness program will remain a priority in our budget. We are grateful for residents like her.

subject_tmpl: Road salt on {STREET} during ice storm — timely
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}. I want to thank your team for getting salt down on {STREET} before the ice storm hit on {DATE}. I had to drive early that morning and the roads were passable when they could have been treacherous. Proactive salting instead of reactive response is the right call and I appreciate that your department makes it. Excellent work.

subject_tmpl: Neighborhood cleanup crew spotted on {STREET} — great to see
body_tmpl: Mayor, I saw a Village crew out picking up litter on {STREET} and {CROSS} on {DATE} and I just wanted to say it matters. The area around the bus stop had been accumulating garbage and your team cleared it out completely. It's not a glamorous job but it makes Bellwood look like a community that takes pride in itself. Thank you for keeping crews doing this kind of work. {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Thank you, {NAME}. A clean streetscape is something every resident deserves. We'll make sure {STREET} and {CROSS} stays on the litter crew's regular route.

subject_tmpl: Commercial buildout at {ADDRESS} — permit team was great
body_tmpl: Hello — {FIRST} {LAST} from {BIZ}. We just completed our commercial buildout at {ADDRESS} and the permit and inspection process could not have gone more smoothly. Every inspection was scheduled on time, feedback was specific and actionable, and the staff were always courteous. As someone who's done buildouts in three different suburbs, Bellwood's process was hands-down the most professional. Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Congratulations on completing the buildout at {ADDRESS}! We really appreciate you saying that — our inspectors work hard to be efficient and consistent. Best of luck with {BIZ}!

subject_tmpl: Garbage pickup never missed — just wanted to say so
body_tmpl: Hi Mayor — I know people write to complain more than to compliment, so let me be the exception. My garbage on {STREET} has been picked up every single week, on schedule, for as long as I can remember. Through heat waves, snowstorms, holidays. It's reliable in a way that I've come to count on. That kind of consistent service is easy to take for granted. I don't want to take it for granted. Thank you. — {FIRST}

subject_tmpl: Minutes from {DATE} council meeting posted quickly — thank you
body_tmpl: Hello — I attended the village board meeting on {DATE} and was happy to find the minutes posted on the website within {DAYS} days. I've been following the {STREET} drainage discussion and wanted to check some of the language from the vote. Having timely, accurate minutes available is really important for civic engagement. Your office runs a tight ship. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for being an engaged resident, {FIRST}. Timely minutes are something we prioritize. If you ever need a certified copy of any resolution, just reach out.

subject_tmpl: Public Works crew during flooding on {DATE} — heroes
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'll keep it brief: the Public Works crew that responded to the flash flooding on {STREET} on {DATE} were absolute heroes. They worked through the night clearing drains and pumping out a basement on our block. By morning the street was draining. These are the people who hold a town together when things go wrong. Please make sure they know they are valued. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for writing this, {FIRST}. I have already shared it with Frank and the whole crew. They worked incredibly hard that night and your words mean more than a formal commendation. Thank you.

subject_tmpl: Stormwater project on {STREET} finished ahead of schedule
body_tmpl: Hi Tom, {FIRST} here at {ADDRESS}. I was told the stormwater work on {STREET} would take {DAYS} days and it wrapped up about a week early. The site was properly barricaded the whole time, noise was within reasonable hours, and the road was restored beautifully. On time or ahead of schedule, clean site, good communication — that's everything you can ask for. Well done to you and the contractor.
reply_tmpl: Great to hear, {FIRST} — Verdi's crew pushed hard on the last phase and earned that early finish. We'll pass your thanks along to them as well. The drainage performance on {STREET} should be noticeably better going forward.

subject_tmpl: Thank you for attending the {STREET} neighborhood meeting
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I organized the neighborhood meeting on {DATE} about traffic concerns near {STREET} and {CROSS} and I did not expect you to attend in person. Your presence and willingness to take questions directly from residents — some of them frustrated — demonstrated real leadership. Even the skeptics in the room left feeling heard. That is not easy to accomplish. Thank you. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for organizing that meeting, {FIRST}. It takes real effort to bring neighbors together and I was glad to be there. We will follow up on the traffic concerns raised. Watch for an update within {DAYS} days.
